capabilities: Combine database normalization principles with AI prompting to enhance schema design and evaluation.

procedure.action: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on queries to identify columns frequently used in WHERE clauses and normalize tables to 3NF using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Invoke AI models to generate potential query patterns and validate schema against these patterns for optimization by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Set up automated tests using pgTAP to ensure schema changes maintain data integrity and performance benchmarks using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Release a CI/CD pipeline with Liquibase to manage and version schema changes, ensuring consistency across environments using blue-green deployment strategy; run smoke_test() against new instance before switching traffic; assert smoke_test_pass_rate >= 1.0 before promoting.
Observe query performance with pg_stat_statements and alert if p95 query time exceeds 100ms for 5 consecutive minutes.

summary: Establish a robust schema design by integrating database normalization with AI prompting techniques, ensuring data integrity and efficient query performance.
title: Database Normalization and AI Prompting Integration

failureConditions: Increased query latency due to suboptimal schema design.
Data anomalies from improper normalization; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
successConditions: All queries return expected results within 100ms p95 latency; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Schema passes all pgTAP tests for data integrity; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
CI/CD pipeline successfully applies schema changes without errors; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
